summary: Menu bar polish, a full-width dashboard, and a more readable dock mail badge.

changed: Menu bar uses a monochrome Nucleus logo mark instead of the clipboard icon
Menu bar password rows add Copy email alongside Copy username, Copy password, and Open URL
Dashboard expands to use the full detail pane width
Dock mail unread badge is larger and easier to read
fixed: Menu bar password save form stays open when clicking outside until Save or Not Now
